providers.name: Graphify
providers.usage_note: Confirmed setup installs the Graphify CLI and current-host project skill, generates project-root `graphify-out/` by trying `graphify extract .` and falling back to code-only `graphify update .` when semantic extract cannot run, then enables provider-native `graphify hook install` when the target is a git repo. Only the CLI/project skill/hooks are required downstream; Graphify MCP/watch stay opt-in outside Runtime Setup. Use `$graphify .`/`/graphify .` or Graphify CLI query/path/explain for project-graph candidates, then confirm conclusions from source/test/log evidence.

commands_display.macos: uv tool install graphifyy==0.8.36; graphify install --project --platform <current-host>; graphify extract . || graphify update .; graphify hook install
commands_display.linux: uv tool install graphifyy==0.8.36; graphify install --project --platform <current-host>; graphify extract . || graphify update .; graphify hook install
commands_display.windows: uv tool install graphifyy==0.8.36; graphify install --project --platform <current-host>; graphify extract . || graphify update .; graphify hook install

installation.next_action: Run bare `$spec-mcp-setup` and confirm the CodeGraph/Graphify provider pack, or use `$spec-mcp-setup --only graphify` for explicit subset install-init. version_pin 已用 `pip index versions graphifyy` 实测到 PyPI 当前发布版本 0.8.36。

safety.install_effect: Installs PyPI package `graphifyy==0.8.36` and verifies the `graphify` CLI. Confirmed provider-pack setup runs current-host project skill install such as `graphify install --project --platform codex`, generates project-root `graphify-out/` via `graphify extract .` with a provider-native `graphify update .` code-only fallback, and installs project-level `graphify hook install` in git repos. Provider writes may include `.codex/skills/graphify/`, `.codex/hooks.json`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude/skills/graphify/`, `CLAUDE.md`, `graphify-out/`, and `.git/hooks/*`; setup reports them as provider-owned runtime/project output and does not auto-add, auto-commit, or promote them to spec-first source.
